descriptionShort: NAIT junior hockey team prepares for season opener against Camrose, featuring returner Cam Bowles and goaltender Matt Cassidy from Stettler.
descriptionLong: NAIT junior hockey team coach discusses roster depth ahead of season opener against Camrose College. Veteran forwards Jay Glass and Cam Bowles lead returnees, while newcomers Dan Gunton (from Prince George) and Bill Hardy (1987 Centennial Cup champion Richmond Sockeyes) bolster the lineup. Goaltender Matt Cassidy of Stettler has impressed in camp. Coach emphasizes Bowles' importance to team success if he stays healthy.

attribution.headline: NAIT prepares for junior hockey season opener
